title: New Book Announcement
summary: Exciting news about my upcoming cozy mystery series!
content: After months of planning and outlining, I'm thrilled to announce that work has begun on a brand-new cozy mystery series. This is my debut novel, The Last Sip of English Breakfast. Readers can expect murder, mystery and the protagonist being our 15-year-old sleuth!

title: Writing Tips
summary: How I create suspense and cozy vibes in my mysteries.
content: One of my favourite techniques is layering small clues throughout a story while keeping the focus on the characters. Building atmosphere can be just as important as plotting the mystery itself. I have my own board that you would typically see in your favourite murder mystery shows!

title: Behind the Scenes
summary: A peek into my writing process and inspiration.
content: From handwritten notes to digital outlines, every book starts with a simple idea. Inspiration often comes from laces I've visited, conversations I've overheard, or mysteries I've always wanted to solve. When writing, I often listen to music from my favourite movies or shows to get me in the mood.
